_setup_instructions.lib_dir: Directory (relative to repo root) where parser maps go. Default 'lib' fits Next.js App Router.
_setup_instructions.components_dir: Directory for client filter components. Default 'components'.
_setup_instructions.generate_tests: Whether to emit a .test.tsx file alongside each component. Set false if the project has no test runner.
_setup_instructions.test_runner: One of: vitest, jest. Determines test-template syntax and imports.
_setup_instructions.adapter_import: Which NuqsAdapter the test wraps. Use 'nuqs/adapters/testing' inside tests; this setting is for the server-side imports.
